meta.release_notes:
# Changelog

All notable changes to this model will be documented in this file.

## [4.0.0] 25.12

### Changed

- introduced `io.catenax.shared.industry_core.common:1.0.0` and `io.catenax.shared.quantity:3.0.0` as a shared model
- renamed `catenaXId` to `globalAssetId`

## [3.0.0] 2024-02-26

### Changed

- replaced the `quantityNumber` and `measurementUnit` properties with the `itemUnit` and `quantityValue` properties of the shared quantity 2.0.0 aspect model
- replaced the whole `CatenaXIdTraitCharacteristic` and its childs with the `UuidV4Trait` of the shared uuid 2.0.0 aspect model
- replaced the whole `BpnTrait` and its childs with the `BpnlTrait` of the shared business_partner_number 2.0.0 aspect model
- description of some objects were adjusted

## [2.0.0] 25.09.2023

### Added

- property called hasAlternative
- Boolean characteristic

### Changed

- Description of the main property 'SingleLevelBomAsBuil' was adapted to the new requirements of the model

## [1.0.0]

### Added

- renamed model from `io.catenax.assembly_part_relationship:1.1.1#AssemblyPartRelationship`
- optional business partner reference (BPNL) for each child item

### Changed

- changed several descriptions due to aspect renaming
- changed `childCatenaXId` to `catenaXId`
- changed `childParts` to `childItems`
- changed several descriptions to use `item` instead of `part` where applicable
- fixed camelCase for `NumberOfObjects` characteristic

### Removed

- removed lifecycle context property from child item

nodes.label: SingleLevelBomAsBuilt
nodes.preferredName: Single Level Bill of Material as Built
nodes.description: The single-level bill of material represents one sub-level of an assembly and does not include any lower-level subassemblies. The as-built lifecycle references all child items as manufactured by the manufacturer referencing only child items in an as built lifecycle themselves, e.g. serial parts or batches.

nodes.label: catenaXId
nodes.description: The Catena-X ID of the given part (e.g. the assembly), valid for the Catena-X dataspace.

nodes.label: childItems
nodes.description: Set of child items, of which the given parent item is assembled by (one structural level down).

nodes.label: createdOn
nodes.description: Timestamp when the relation between the parent item and the child item was created, e.g. when the serialized child part was assembled into the given part.

nodes.label: quantity
nodes.description: Quantity of which the child item is assembled into the parent item. In general it is '1' for serialized parts.

nodes.label: lastModifiedOn
nodes.description: Timestamp when the assembly relationship between parent item and child item was last modified.

nodes.label: businessPartner
nodes.description: The supplier of the given child item.

nodes.label: quantityNumber
nodes.description: The number of objects related to the measurement unit

nodes.label: measurementUnit
nodes.description: Unit of Measurement for the quantity of serialized objects

nodes.label: CatenaXIdTraitCharacteristic
nodes.description: Trait to ensure UUID v4 data format

nodes.label: SetOfChildItemsCharacteristic
nodes.description: Set of child items the parent item is assembled by (one structural level down).

nodes.label: Uuidv4Characteristic
nodes.description: A version 4 UUID is a universally unique identifier that is generated using random 32 hexadecimal characters.

nodes.label: NumberOfObjects
nodes.description: Quantifiable number of objects in reference to the measurementUnit

nodes.label: Uuidv4RegularExpression
nodes.description: The provided regular expression ensures that the UUID is composed of five groups of characters separated by hyphens, in the form 8-4-4-4-12 for a total of 36 characters (32 hexadecimal characters and 4 hyphens), optionally prefixed by "urn:uuid:" to make it an IRI.

nodes.label: BpnConstraint
nodes.description: Business Partner Number Regular Expression allowing only BPNL which stands for a legal entity.

nodes.label: ChildData
nodes.description: Catena-X ID and meta data of the assembled child item.

nodes.label: Quantity
nodes.description: Comprises the number of objects and the unit of measurement for the respective child objects

nodes.label: QuantityCharacteristic
nodes.description: Describes the quantity in which the child item is assembled in the given parent item by providing a quantity value and the measurement unit in which the quantity is measured.
